title: phusioo #5448
definition:
1) to make natural, to cause a thing to pass into nature
 2) to inflate, blow up, to cause to swell up
    2a) to puff up, make proud
    2b) to be puffed up, to bear one's self loftily, be proud
nasbUsage:

 2) to inflate, blow up, to cause to swell up
    2a) to puff up, make proud
